narrative:
Cols 53-H (precinct in Franklin County) has 494 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.6 percentage points.
